options.name: --batch
options.description:
Enables renaming of multiple files at once. Otherwise,
renaming will only proceed if exactly one file is matched.

options.name: --directory
options.description:
Uses the current directory name instead of the input file
name as the basis for renaming.

options.name: --dry-run
options.description:
Does not perform any actual renaming, instead only
simulating the rename operation.

options.name: --filter
options.description:
Wildcard pattern to match file(s) to, such as "*.txt" or
"Export*.*".

options.name: --iso
options.description:
Instructs naming formats to prefer ISO date format to
"friendlier" date formats.

options.name: --non-interactive
options.description:
Forces the command to proceed without any user input. This
will bypass any prompts and skip formats that require user
interaction

options.name: --separator
options.description:
The separator to use between the components of a target
name (where applicable).

arguments.name: dir
arguments.description: The folder to search for file(s) to rename.
